About Me

Crafting the web since 2013.

Hi, I'm Michele — a versatile web developer with over 11 years in e-commerce. I build digital platforms and custom systems for medium and large businesses, working across the full stack: from UI/UX analysis to technical architecture.

Specialised in custom module development for PrestaShop, I create solutions that extend native functionality and improve the user experience for both admins and customers.

In recent years I've expanded into digital marketing, managing Google Ads and Meta Ads campaigns to bridge the gap between development and business growth.

🛒
E-Commerce Expert
PrestaShop, WooCommerce, Magento, Shopify, OpenCart — full lifecycle management from strategy to launch.

Custom Development
Bespoke modules, API integrations, CSV automation pipelines, PWA and QR code access platforms.
📈
Growth & Marketing
Lead generation, landing pages, remarketing funnels, Google Ads and Meta Ads management.

Team & Strategy
Coordinating development teams, liaising with clients, bridging technical and business requirements.
